description: Style NoteThese blue wedges from catwalk are simple and elegant. The bow tie effect on the straps make it look absolutely feminine and enhance the woman in you. Team these with slightly flared denims for an updated 70's look.Heel: 4.5& rdquo Product DetailsBlue wedges with forefoot strap with a bow design and an ankle strap with a midfoot strap with a tang claspSmooth and printed footbed with stitched detailing on the periphery of the footbedTextured rubber outsole with an upraised heel and espadrille wedges Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
